description: CompositionBrown bottoms made of 95% polyester and 5% spandex, with an elasticated waist, stitch detailing, two mock pockets on the front with a small pouch on the right, and two pockets on the backFittingSlimWash careMachine or hand wash separatelyUse mild detergent onlyDo not bleach or wringDry in shadeMedium ironSlim is in! So flaunt your lovely long legs in style in these skinny polyester pants from jealous 21. The stretchable polyester makes it an absolutely comfortable wear.
